title: Easy Mail
description: An easy mail system for your server!
body:
EDIT: I highly encourage you use another mod called [Fabric Mail](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-mail) - it has more features and is better maintained.

A little mod I created because I couldn't find one like it.
An easy mail system for your server.
- Send messages to players online and offline
- Operators can broadcast messages to everyone with /mailall

Usage:
- /mail - mail a player. If the whitelist is enabled then it will only send mail to the whitelisted players, and it will show all the available players as suggestions.
- /readmail - read all the mail send to you.
- /mailall - For operators only. Send a message to everyone whether they're online or offline. Any instances of @player in the message will be replaced with the recipient's name.
For example, if an operator sends a broadcast saying "Hello @player!", then Joe will see "Hello Joe!" while Bob would see "Hello Bob!"
